"Asher didn't know what was going to happen. All he knew was that humans could never be trusted, no matter how nice they seem."

catboy!char x new owner!user

this a lot of yapping srry:

in honor of 600 followers (weird considering i haven't posted a single thing since the 500 follower announcement) i made a remake of my most popular bot!!

it was also in high demand from a stupid dinosaur named rex because apparently the original is "bad" 😒 (it is absolutely horrendous)

SO HERE YOU GO!! thanks for 600 followers :3

og bot: catboy || asher fairley

if any of you have any old bots you'd like me to remake, please share!! i'd be happy to remake them since its kinda fun

i changed up a lot of things, including his personality, his background and even his age and height and pic and stuff. obviously the first message too. i'd say its a major improvement, and it really shows how much my writing has changed
